channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: al-jAhiz on hindus
item.description: We have already noted that Indians are pre-eminent in astronomy, mathematics (in which they have their own number system) and medicine. They possess extensive medical knowledge and have cures for the most terrible diseases. They create sculptures and paintings with which they adorn alcoves and niches. Chess, the noble game of strategy and cunning, is an Indian invention. Scimitars from Burma are used by them with great skill and dexterity.
